name: byte-mcp-server
description: Per-byte USDC data feeds for AI agents. x402 pay-per-call on Base mainnet; EIP-712-attested payloads, no API keys.
long_description: An MCP server for PayPerByte — verified, provenance-first data feeds for AI agents. Two rails: pay-per-call via the x402 gateway settles real USDC on Base mainnet (flagship: the $0.10 Address Reputation Oracle — a signed ALLOW/WARN/BLOCK verdict on a receiving address before an agent releases funds); the on-chain subscription/broadcast layer (BYTE Library contracts, fact-oracle escrow, indexer) runs on Arbitrum Sepolia testnet, mainnet gated on an external security audit. Agents discover first-party publishers, subscribe to live feeds (weather, earthquakes, threat-intel, positioning, liquidations), buy single packets via x402, and verify-before-act — recompute a payload's keccak256 and check it against the publisher's EIP-712 PayloadAttestation before trusting it. The 9 read-only tools need no wallet; the write tools and byte_buy_data require a private key (buys spend real USDC — use a dedicated wallet). No token.

private_key.title: Wallet Private Key
private_key.description: Ethereum private key for write/buy tools (subscribe, publish, buy_data — buy_data spends real Base-mainnet USDC; use a dedicated wallet). Leave blank for read-only mode.

rpc_url.title: Arbitrum RPC URL
rpc_url.description: Arbitrum Sepolia RPC endpoint. Uses a public default if blank.

indexer_url.title: Indexer API URL
indexer_url.description: Byte Protocol indexer API URL. Uses the hosted default if blank.
